horoscope: While there can be some wonderful new ideas coming out of the day, dear Aries, matters of ownership can be a bit heavy today, or situations pull up the need to manage feelings of resentment. If you're facing recurring problems with friends or with getting new projects off the ground, recognize the patterns now and aim to get to the bottom of the situation. There are mixed messages to manage, and perhaps some worries or concerns that you're not in the loop. If you find yourself over-managing a situation, it's a sign that you need to pull back, detach a little, and rest. People may not be forthcoming, but it's important not to try to fill in the blanks since the tendency is to suspect hidden agendas. Treading lightly is best for now.

Venus is in your sign, and this draws attention to you, dear Taurus. Today, as Venus and Pluto clash, your desire for more freedom and spontaneity is strong, but your ambitions or drive to be on top of your work can interfere, leading to frustration. Try not to let worries about competition, changes, or uncertainties in your work, your future, or your reputation affect your personal life and enjoyment. If you're not feeling as confident as you normally do, take the time to center yourself, then get back in the game. If there's tension in your interactions today, consider that it's really about power, and that real empowerment doesn't come from manipulating or having power over others, but rather from controlling your own impulses and your own life. You don't want to be told what to do right now, so be careful not to take on that role with someone. Just for now, pushing boundaries may not yield desired results. However, the day is a big idea day, and interesting insights are likely.

Your desires are complicated in some ways today, dear Gemini, and it's best to work through them and sort them out rather than allow them to control you. Watch for hidden agendas and roundabout moves as Venus and Pluto clash today. Something you'd prefer to keep private or unspoken can come to light, or your history can be so real in your mind that it interferes with the present. Stirring the pot may lead to good conversations, but it's hard to know which way things will go just for now. If you take your time and, with some self-awareness, you can get to the heart of a matter, and you might open your eyes to something that helps you grow. Avoid stifling feelings that are unpleasant or uncomfortable, as what you've buried won't go away until you face them, and can drive your behavior in destructive ways. Seek the root of the problem. Fortunately, ideas are plentiful today, and they help warm you up.

Today holds happy energy for new ideas and plans, dear Cancer. Still, a Venus-Pluto influence later today can point to a tendency to hold onto an issue that's dragging you down only because you're afraid to let it go. The desire to enjoy your friendships, social life, or new projects is strong, but it can be tough to do so with worries in the mix. Take a break from the routine, especially if it's making you feel as if you are in a rut. Fear of being out of the loop or of being unprepared can be at the root of challenging behaviors today. Power plays may be at work, but not necessarily obvious. Aim to sort out mixed feelings.

While interesting insights and ideas are abundant today, dear Leo, sensitivity and defensiveness can run high with a Venus-Pluto square shaking things up. Things we've buried or ignored, mainly related to our fears, can emerge in unruly and unexpected ways, but a little self-knowledge and understanding can go a long way. Your ambitions are motivating and even enjoyable these days, but resentment from others or your own fear of pulling your attention away from a relationship can spoil the fun. Aim to make peace with the past rather than bring it into the present in disruptive ways. Fortunately, engaging with these emotions can help you recognize desires you may not have known were yours!

The Moon moves into your solar third house today, dear Virgo, and you seek lighthearted interactions. While good ideas are easy to find today, today's Venus-Pluto square is complicated! This transit can pull up buried frustrations and trigger fears about being out of the loop or out of control of a situation. The desire to explore the world around you, live life more spontaneously and expressively, expand your mind, and enjoy different settings and experiences is strong these days. Today, you may feel weighed down by work or health pressures. Fewer mobility options or a feeling of being overwhelmed with things to do can be a theme. Delegating tasks, releasing a hold on your work or routines if it's too tight, or reducing your workload might help you find more time to explore, expand, and flourish. Consider that if you've pushed yourself too hard in a particular area, it can infringe upon your non-routine activities.

The Moon's move into your solar second house finds you seeking more predictability in your life today, dear Libra. While you can enjoy planning and building today, a Venus-Pluto square can complicate feelings and interactions. The need to handle lingering problems and fears becomes obvious. Tensions in your romantic or personal life can be immense draws, pulling you away from exploring new feelings and experiences. You might also be going over a conversation or interaction, seeking a clue or answer that is not quite within your reach. Try to let go of overanalyzing matters or dwelling on things you can't or no longer control so you can free yourself up for more positive, empowering energy to come into your life. You might consider possessive streaks as a symptom of something that runs more deeply than the matter at hand. Consciously allowing yourself to let go, even a little, can be cathartic and a wonderful gift to yourself now. Aim to recognize when it's best to let go and move on, if only for your own peace of mind.

The Moon's move into your sign today is spontaneous and transparent, dear Scorpio. While the day holds light energy for ideas, a Venus-Pluto square can produce some tension. There can be storm clouds if you've been ignoring or burying your feelings, fears, or resentments, particularly with family, a close friend, or a partner. At the root of stress may be a need to make profound, lasting changes that pull you out of a rut. However, try not to put all the pressure on yourself to do so immediately. Keeping the peace is a noble aspiration, but sometimes it encourages holding onto grudges. Today, you may see these resentments more clearly, which is helpful and eye-opening. If stress weakens you enough that insecurities and fears emerge and take over, consider strategies to avoid dwelling on them. While mixed signals are likely, there is also a real potential for inspiring conversations.

With today's Venus-Pluto square, dear Sagittarius, frustrations are possible if you feel that your relationships, work, or daily affairs are getting out of your control. You have many things going on at once, and while you often react to pressures by suiting up mentally, it's a good idea to aim for more flexibility. The day has a way of showing us where we're too attached. Certainly, letting go of ideas or plans that are no longer serving you well will ultimately be relieving. Thought patterns that are dragging you down should go. Emotions are big today, and while you're building your faith and coming to interesting insights, there can be some insecurity about how things are playing out. Temporarily, it is best to sidestep situations that involve a confrontation or intense demands on your time and energy. If circumstances slow you down, it could be a blessing in disguise, prompting you to make beneficial adjustments.

With a Venus-Pluto transit, dear Capricorn, there can be twists or complications with your feelings in a relationship or an issue related to money and resources you're concerned about that affects your mood in spots today. It makes sense to be more cautious with your things just for now and to practice patience as you understand your fears and feelings. Watch for issues with self-worth or concerns about money and things that interfere with your ability to let your hair down and express yourself freely. It can be challenging to stay detached and impartial now, and it's far too easy to fixate on problems. Ideally, you get into better touch with your desires and goals now, as today's minor frustrations can open your eyes to buried ambitions and needs. Today's energies are strong for good ideas and joy in looking ahead.

Pluto in your sign is under a bit of strain today, dear Aquarius, and if you're in a rut, the situation can frustrate you more than usual. Restlessness is possible, at least until you recognize and honor your need to make peace with yourself. It may be wise to focus on fixing problem areas, without pressuring yourself to do everything at once. Today's tensions deserve some examination, however, if they're persistent and recurring. They're likely related to frustrations with feeling that you're not in control or "in the know" about your circumstances. Your ambition or desire to stay on top of things may need to be tamed so you can take the time off you need. If there are interpersonal conflicts today, try to learn from them rather than fall back into old patterns of relating that stifle you in the long run. Transits today are strong for ideas and insights. You can reach a new level of understanding of a matter, which can be satisfying. Reorganizing, redecorating, investing in your home, and connecting to loved ones in healthier ways can be goals.

While there can be exciting ideas and a resolution to a problem, dear Pisces, today's energies are a little complicated and point to some obstacles to face before feeling fresh and renewed. With Venus and Pluto in a square aspect, watch for attempts to control situations too tightly. There is a tendency to push problems or complicated feelings to the side these days, but today, they can surface in surprising or disruptive ways. If you are tense today, aim to better understand your sensitive points and try to let go of mental pressure or circling. Look for creative ways to express your frustrations, or seek out a trusted confidant to help you release buried tensions. You are highly alert today, but be careful it doesn't lead to overstimulation or nervousness.
